data.title: Inflation Shows No Sign of Accelerating in France, Spain as ECB Mulls Next Steps — Update
data.description:
By Joshua Kirby 




  Annual inflation showed no signs of picking up pace in two of the eurozone's largest economies, maintaining a slim possibility of a fresh cut to interest rates at next month's European Central Bank policy meeting. 



  French consumer-price inflation, harmonized to European Union standards, was 0.8% in August, slowing from a 0.9% annual rate in July, figures from France's statistics agency showed Friday. The continued easing in price rises in the eurozone's second-largest economy takes annual inflation further below the 2% level ECB policymakers consider optimal. That represents "a glimmer of hope for ECB doves," Pantheon Macroeconomics' Claus Vistesen wrote. 



  In Spain, annual inflation meanwhile held steady at 2.7%, the same rate as in July, the country's own statistics authority said Friday. 



  France's food inflation was stable on month, the figures showed, while energy prices fell at a slower rate on year than in July, suggesting a decrease in core inflation, a closely-watched metric that strips out those more volatile elements. Investors expect the ECB to keep holding its key deposit rate at 2.0% at September's meeting, according to LSEG Refinitiv data, though some members of the central bank's governing council have stressed that all options remain open. 



  France's economy grew at a relatively robust rate over the second quarter, its statistics agency confirmed Friday. Spain, boosted by a booming tourism sector and strong migration flows, continued to outperform much of the wealthy world.  But growth among the eurozone's major economies could well slow in the latter half of the year. 



  French household spending fell in July, separate figures showed Friday, suggesting little hope of a consumer-led recovery. The country has also endured a political deadlock since last summer, when President Emmanuel Macron's party saw its presence in the National Assembly eroded in snap elections. A minority government currently led by premier Francois Bayrou faces a confidence vote early next month, which it is widely expected to lose, further distancing the budgetary measures needed to wrest control of the county's gaping budget deficit. 



  A fresh hold on interest rates could further strengthen the euro, which has gained more than 10% against the dollar in the year to date. The dollar would further weaken if the Federal Reserve meanwhile moves to lower interest rates at next month's policy meeting, an outcome against which the odds have narrowed sharply in recent weeks. 





  Write to Joshua Kirby at joshua.kirby@wsj.com; @joshualeokirby 





  (END) Dow Jones Newswires



  August 29, 2025 03:42 ET (07:42 GMT)


Copyright (c) 2025 Dow Jones & Company, Inc.

data.title: U.S. Futures, European Stocks Mostly Down
data.description:
U.S. futures for the S&P 500 were down 0.1% and futures for the Dow Jones Industrial Average fell 0.2%. Changes in futures do not necessarily predict movements after the opening bell.

In Europe, the Stoxx Europe 600 declined 0.1% in morning trading. Ackermans & Van Haaren added 2.8% and Rheinmetall rose 2.7%. On the other hand, NatWest Group sunk 3.8%, and Lloyds Banking Group dropped 2.8%. The FTSE 100 lost 0.1%. Other stocks in Europe were mixed as France's CAC 40 decreased 0.1% and Germany's DAX held steady.

The Wall Street Journal Dollar Index climbed 0.1% to 95.19.

In commodities, Brent crude dropped 0.7% to $67.52 a barrel, and WTI crude dropped 0.8% to $64.11 a barrel. The European benchmark price for natural gas, the Dutch futures contract TTF, was flat at 31.71 euros a megawatt hour.

The German 10-year Bund yield rose by 1 basis point to 2.71% from 2.698%, and the yield on the 10-year U.S. Treasury climbed by 1 basis point to 4.222% from 4.209%. Bond prices and yields move in opposite directions.

Stocks in Asia were mixed as Japan's Nikkei 225 index fell 0.3%, whereas Hong Kong's Hang Seng gained 0.9%. China's benchmark Shanghai Composite gained 0.4%. 




  -This article was automatically generated by MarketWatch. 





  Write to Barcelona Editors at barcelonaeditors@dowjones.com 





  (END) Dow Jones Newswires



  August 29, 2025 03:48 ET (07:48 GMT)

data.title: ZINZINO AB (PUBL.): INTERIM REPORT FOR THE SECOND QUARTER OF 2025
data.description:
ZINZINO AB (PUBL.): INTERIM REPORT FOR THE SECOND QUARTER OF 2025

ZINZINO AB (PUBL.): INTERIM REPORT FOR THE SECOND QUARTER OF 2025

PR Newswire

GOTHENBURG, Sweden, Aug. 29, 2025

STRONG SALES GROWTH AND INCREASED EARNINGS IN THE SECOND QUARTER

GOTHENBURG, Sweden, Aug. 29, 2025 /PRNewswire/ -- Revenue for the second quarter of 2025 amounted to SEK 794.4 million (507.0), representing growth of 57% (24%) compared with the same period last year. In local currencies, revenue increased by 62% year over year. EBITDA rose to SEK 79.7 million (63.0), with an EBITDA margin of 10.0% (12.4%).

Several revenue-driving initiatives were implemented during the quarter. Notably, Zinzino acquired the assets of Valentus Global and Ecosystem SAS to strengthen its distribution power in Europe. In addition, the Philippines achieved full market status, and China was launched with a locally adapted concept.

APRIL-JUNE

  • Total revenue amounted to SEK 794.4 (507.0) million, corresponding to growth of 57% (24%)
  • Gross profit amounted to SEK 247.9 (174.5) million and the gross profit margin was 31.2% (34.4%)
  • EBITDA amounted to SEK 79.7 (63.0) million and the EBITDA margin amounted to 10.0% (12.4%)
  • Cash flow from operating activities amounted to SEK 112.6 (93.2) million

JANUARY-JUNE

  • Total revenue amounted to SEK 1,518.1 (961.6) million, corresponding to growth of 58% (20%)
  • Gross profit amounted to SEK 471.5 (335.4) million and the gross profit margin was 31.1% (34.9%)
  • EBITDA amounted to SEK 158.4 (114.7) million and the EBITDA margin amounted to 10.4% (11.9%)
  • Cash flow from operating activities amounted to SEK 133.7 (91.5) million
  • Cash and cash equivalents amounted to SEK 408.5 (296.0) million on the balance sheet date

Link to the report:
 https://www.zinzino.com/site/SE/sv-SE/om-oss/investerare/

For more information:
Dag Bergheim Pettersen, CEO, Zinzino, +47 (0) 932 25 700, dag@zinzino.com
Fredrik Nielsen, CFO, Zinzino, +46 (0) 707 900 174, fredrik.nielsen@zinzino.com

Pictures for publication free of charge:
marketing@zinzino.com

Certified Adviser:
DNB Carnegie Investment Bank AB (publ.)

data.title: Dow Jones Top Company Headlines at 3 AM ET: Alibaba Earnings Are Coming. AI, Price Wars, and Tariffs Could Leave Their Mark. | Cambricon ...
data.description:
Alibaba Earnings Are Coming. AI, Price Wars, and Tariffs Could Leave Their Mark.

Alibaba, often seen as a bellwether for the Chinese economy, has seen shares outperform the Chinese stock market this year, rising more than 40%.

----

Cambricon Technologies Warns of Trading Risks After Stock Surges

The chip maker overtook liquor maker Kweichow Moutai as China's most valuable stock this week.

----

Caterpillar Says Higher Tariff Costs May Reach $1.8 Billion

The construction and mining manufacturer is now expecting tariffs to have a greater impact on its finances.

----

Gap Expects Stronger Headwinds From Tariffs This Fiscal Year

The apparel company forecast larger ripples from tariffs this fiscal year given recent changes in trade policy, but said it expects to mitigate any added costs over time.

----

Marvell's stock is falling as its earnings didn't live up to the AI hype

The chip company said its record revenue of $2 billion was driven by AI demand for its custom chips, but Marvell didn't deliver upside on its top line.

----

Petco Boosts Earnings Outlook, Swings to Profit

The pet-products retailer raised its full-year earnings outlook after swinging to a profit in its latest quarter as its turnaround progresses.

----

Ulta Beauty Lifts Fiscal-Year Guidance as Second-Quarter Profit, Sales Rise

The cosmetics and fragrances retailer boosted its guidance for the fiscal year.

----

Autodesk Bumps Up Guidance as Sales Jump

The company, which provides AutoCAD and other design software, logged double-digit sales growth in its latest quarter, helped by strong demand for its architecture, engineering, construction and operations software.

----

Affirm Swings to Profit as Top Merchants Boost Volume

The buy now, pay later company saw gross merchandise volume at its top five merchants and platform partners increasing 41%.

----

With Outcome Uncertain, UAW Claims Battery Plant Win

A contest over United Auto Workers union representation at a Kentucky EV battery plant of Ford Motor joint-venture BlueOval SK is coming come down to a handful of disputed ballots.

----

Hormel to Raise Prices, Citing Costlier Pork, Beef and Nuts

The Spam maker is the latest company to warn of higher prices for food and household goods. Rising commodity costs led it to reduce its profit outlook.

----

Dick's Sporting Goods Lifts Outlook as Sales Climb

The retailer raised its full-year guidance after a strong first half as it comes within weeks of acquiring Foot Locker, though a softening of its gross margin outlook weighed on shares.

----

Lawmakers Press UnitedHealth on Hack Loan Repayments

The senators probe tactics the healthcare giant used to collect debts after a 2024 cyberattack.

----

Stada Eyes IPO in Autumn if Conditions Are Right

The German pharmaceutical company is backed by private-equity firms Bain Capital and Cinven. 




  (END) Dow Jones Newswires



  August 29, 2025 03:15 ET (07:15 GMT)


Copyright (c) 2025 Dow Jones & Company, Inc.

data.title: Hilbert Group Publishes Interim Report for The Second Quarter 2025
data.description:
STOCKHOLM, SE / ACCESS Newswire / August 29, 2025 / Hilbert Group (STO:HILB-B) (FRA:999)

August 29, 2025
The second quarter 2025
(compared to second quarter 2024)

  • Revenues amounted to KSEK 46,224.2 (KSEK 27,304.1)

  • Operating profit/loss (EBIT) totalled KSEK -18,068.2 (KSEK -13,736.7)

  • Results for the period were KSEK -26,270.8 (KSEK -14,996.8)

  • Net Cash flow from operating activities amounted to KSEK -2,790.4 (KSEK -5,191)

  • Earnings per share before and after dilution amounted to SEK -0.36 (SEK -0.23)

Year to date January - June 2025
(compared to January - June 2024)

  • Revenues amounted to KSEK 91,201.9 (KSEK 39,234.8)

  • Operating profit/loss (EBIT) totaled KSEK -29,920.9 (KSEK -21,734.5)

  • Results for the period were KSEK -50,897.2 (KSEK -18,517.1)

  • Cash flow from operating activities amounted to KSEK -11,043.3 (KSEK -14,067.8)

  • Earnings per share before and after dilution amounted to SEK -0.73 (SEK -0.29)

HILBERT GROUP FINANCIAL REPORTS CAN BE FOUND HERE .

A VIDEO PRESENTATION OF THE Q2 2025 REPORT AND THE BUSINESS OUTLOOK FOR HILBERT GROUP CAN BE FOUND HERE .

Highlights from the CEO's address

Xapo Partnership Milestone
A significant development this quarter was Xapo securing the requisite licensing required for their banking app launch. With the app going live on 1st of September, Xapo is positioned to convert approximately 10,000 Bitcoins from their existing depositor base. This represents a cornerstone opportunity for our asset management division and validates our strategic partnership approach.

Syntetika: Platform Innovation Accelerating
We're on track for our full platform launch in September 2025, with SyntX - our decentralized exchange for tokenized real-world assets - already completed as the first of two key development milestones. Our $SYNT token seed round exceeded all expectations, achieving 6x oversubscription and ultimately expanding to $2.5 million to accommodate strategic partner participation. This overwhelming market response validates investor confidence in Syntetika's revolutionary mission to seamlessly integrate decentralized finance with institutional-grade asset management.

Treasury Strategy
On July 4th, Hilbert unveiled our differentiated digital assets treasury program, representing a paradigm shift in corporate treasury management. We are implementing an advanced capital allocation framework designed to optimize balance sheet efficiency while creating distinctive shareholder value through alpha creation and strategic ecosystem partnerships.
Unlike conventional crypto treasury approaches, Hilbert will actively manage our treasury capital to generate additional alpha while prudently managing downside volatility exposure. Beyond our LDA financing facility, we are currently in advanced negotiations with multiple institutions regarding additional strategic financing arrangements.

Market Outlook and Strategic Vision
We remain exceptionally well-positioned in an increasingly favorable market environment. Bitcoin's continued strength, accelerating institutional adoption, and improving regulatory clarity - particularly in the US - create tailwinds for our entire business model.

The tremendous progress made across our underlying business fundamentals - from our expanding asset management pipeline to the exceptional traction of our Syntetika platform - demonstrates the strength of our strategic execution. With our comprehensive financing arrangements now in place, we are fully funded to execute our operational roadmap for the foreseeable future, providing us with the strategic flexibility to capitalize on market opportunities without capital constraints.

For further information, please contact:
Barnali Biswal, CEO or
Niclas Sandström, Co-founder
+46 (0)8 502 353 00

About Us

Hilbert group is a quantitative investment company specializing in algorithmic trading strategies in digital asset markets.

Hilbert Group is a Swedish public company and is committed to providing operational infrastructure, risk management and corporate governance that meets the ever-increasing demands of institutional investors.

Hilbert Group is listed on Nasdaq First North Growth Market (ticker HILB B) with Redeye AB as Certified Adviser.

For more information, visit: www.hilbert.group

This information is information that Hilbert Group is obliged to make public pursuant to the EU Market Abuse Regulation. The information was submitted for publication, through the agency of the contact persons set out above, at 2025-08-29 09:00 CEST.

Attachments

HILBERT Q2 25
Presentation Q2 2025

data.title: Wolters Kluwer Triumphs With Four “Category Leader” Designations and One “Best-of-Breed” Honor in Chartis Research GRC Report
data.description:
Wolters Kluwer Triumphs With Four “Category Leader” Designations and One “Best-of-Breed” Honor in Chartis Research GRC Report

Achievement highlights continuing domain expertise across wide array of risk and compliance areas

Wolters Kluwer has been recognized for domain expertise in a number of major governance, risk and compliance spaces as part of the RiskTech Governance, Resilience and Compliance Solutions Vendor Landscape Report published by Chartis Research. In earning distinctions across five RiskTech quadrants in the report, the company won four “Category Leader” designations as well as one “Best-of-Breed” honor.

Wolters Kluwer Financial & Corporate Compliance (FCC) earned Category Leader wins for Regulatory Intelligence, eGRC, and Third-Party Risk Management Solutions, along with a Best of Breed designation for GRC Analytics. Wolters Kluwer Corporate Performance & ESG won a Category Leader designation for Audit Risk Management Solutions.

“These designations are a tremendous achievement in highlighting our capabilities across a number of key areas critical to the success of our customers,” said Chuck Ross, Vice President and Segment Leader, Investment Compliance Solutions & Compliance Program Management, Wolters Kluwer FCC. “In leveraging the latest technologies, combined with a highly knowledgeable and experienced team, our approach is providing financial institutions an unmatched level of expert, augmented intelligence, which is helping guide, streamline and optimize their risk management and regulatory compliance efforts.”

Chartis defines Regulatory Intelligence as its newest “core” to GRC solutions, as the sheer volume and potential magnitude of regulatory changes demand sophisticated tools capable of discovering, navigating, and interpreting regulatory content and related business and risk obligations. ​

​“With regulatory environments becoming more intricate, Chartis believes that regulatory Intelligence has become a center post for effective corporate governance integrated with classic GRC systems, supporting all three lines of enterprise defense monitoring, search and discovery, content analytics, regulatory inventory management and horizon scanning,” writes Chartis. “This includes advancements in natural language processing for faster and more efficient monitoring and interpretation of complex regulatory documents, along with predictive modeling to foresee regulatory shifts, thereby reducing compliance costs and accelerating value.”

​“We are pleased to be recognized as a category leader by Chartis in this prestigious industry report,” said Frans Klaassen, Senior Vice President and General Manager, Wolters Kluwer TeamMate. “We are proud to provide best-in-class audit and assurance expert solutions and are committed to continuous innovation to harness advanced technologies that support our clients today and into the future.”

Chartis defines category leaders as those firms that “combine depth and breadth of functionality, technology and content with the required organizational characteristics to capture significant share in their market.” Best-of-Breed winners similarly demonstrate significant market share and are “often distinguished by a growing client base, superior sales and marketing execution, and a clear strategy for sustainable, profitable growth.”

Wolters Kluwer Compliance Solutions is a market leader and trusted provider of risk management and regulatory compliance solutions and services to U.S. banks, credit unions, insurers and securities firms. The business sits within Wolters Kluwer’s Financial & Corporate Compliance (FCC) division, helping these financial institutions efficiently manage risk and regulatory compliance obligations.

For more information about Wolters Kluwer, please visit: www.wolterskluwer.com.

About Wolters Kluwer

Wolters Kluwer (EURONEXT: WKL) is a global leader in information, software solutions and services for professionals in healthcare; tax and accounting; financial and corporate compliance; legal and regulatory; corporate performance and ESG. We help our customers make critical decisions every day by providing expert solutions that combine deep domain knowledge with technology and services.

Wolters Kluwer reported 2024 annual revenues of €5.9 billion. The group serves customers in over 180 countries, maintains operations in over 40 countries, and employs approximately 21,600 people worldwide. The company is headquartered in Alphen aan den Rijn, the Netherlands.

For more information, visit www.wolterskluwer.com, follow us on LinkedIn, Facebook, YouTube and Instagram.

Media Contact
David Feider
Associate Director, External Communications
Financial & Corporate Compliance
Wolters Kluwer
Office +1 612-246-9454
david.feider@wolterskluwer.com

View source version on businesswire.com: https://www.businesswire.com/news/home/20250829001040/en/

data.title: No Credit Check Loans: RadCred Launches AI Matching Bot For Bad Credit Guaranteed Approval Loan for Low Credit Score Borrowers in USA
data.description:
Glendale, CA, Aug. 29, 2025 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- RadCred, the innovative AI-powered loan matching platform, today announced the launch of its advanced matching bot designed specifically for bad credit loans guaranteed approval applications across the United States. This groundbreaking technology addresses a critical financial gap affecting millions of Americans, with Federal Reserve data showing that 37% of adults would struggle to cover a $400 emergency expense using cash alone. 

Traditional banks consistently reject borrowers with low credit scores, leaving vulnerable consumers searching for alternatives during financial crises. The rising demand for no credit check loans reflects broader economic pressures, including inflation, medical emergencies, and unexpected expenses that can't wait for lengthy bank approvals. RadCred's AI bot provides a safe, transparent, and efficient solution connecting borrowers with licensed lenders who specialize in instant approval loans and same day payday loans for creditworthy applicants who need immediate financial relief.

Why People Search for "No Credit Check Loans Guaranteed Approval"?

Multiple economic pressures drive the surge in searches for no credit check loans guaranteed approval in 2025:

  • Inflation Impact - Rising costs for groceries, gas, and housing force families to seek immediate financial solutions when budgets fall short of essential expenses

  • Medical & Emergency Expenses - Unexpected medical bills and car repairs require instant funding that can't wait for traditional bank approval processes, taking days or weeks

  • Traditional Bank Rejection - Americans with poor FICO scores face systematic denial from banks requiring credit scores above 650 for personal loan approval

  • Search Volume Surge - Industry data reveals 40% increase in searches for instant approval bad credit loans during the first half of 2025, indicating widespread financial stress

  • 24/7 Emergency Needs - Weekend emergencies and after-hours financial crises fuel demand for fast cash loans and payday loans online available outside traditional banking hours

What Are No Credit Check Loans in 2025?

No credit check loans are financial products created for borrowers unable to qualify for traditional bank loans due to poor credit scores or limited credit histories. These loans typically cover small to medium amounts and avoid hard inquiries that could further lower FICO scores. Beneficiaries often include subprime borrowers with scores under 580, young adults with little credit history, or those recovering from past financial challenges who need loans for bad credit assistance. 

RadCred sets itself apart by connecting borrowers with licensed lenders offering transparent terms and competitive rates on payday loans bad credit options. Its AI-driven platform uses soft credit pulls for personal loans for bad credit, providing flexible repayment terms that range from short-term to extended installment loans.

How Soft Credit Pulls Work for No Credit Check Loans?

Soft credit checks represent a consumer-friendly approach that allows lenders to evaluate creditworthiness without negatively impacting borrowers' FICO scores. Unlike hard credit pulls that can reduce credit scores by several points and remain visible on credit reports for two years, soft inquiries provide lenders with essential credit information while protecting borrowers from additional credit damage. 

RadCred's AI matching system uses soft credit check loans methodology exclusively during the prequalification phase, enabling no credit check loan prequalification without penalizing applicants. This approach allows borrowers to safely explore multiple bad credit instant loans options and compare terms from various lenders without worrying about FICO score impact. 

Only when borrowers accept final loan offers do lenders perform hard credit checks, giving consumers complete control over when their credit scores might be affected during the borrowing process.

How Borrowers With Poor Credit Gain Access to Funds?

RadCred's AI technology evaluates over 100 data points beyond traditional credit scores to assess borrower eligibility for bad credit loans guaranteed approval opportunities. The system analyzes income stability, spending patterns, employment history, and repayment capacity to provide comprehensive borrower profiles for lending partners. 

This holistic approach enables loans for poor credit borrowers who have been systematically excluded from mainstream banking due to past financial difficulties or limited credit history. The AI matching process creates equal opportunities for approval by connecting applicants with lenders who specialize in alternative underwriting methods and understand the complexities of subprime lending. 

Emergency loans no credit check options become accessible to borrowers who demonstrate current financial responsibility despite historical credit challenges. Fast approval loans through RadCred's network can provide same-day funding for qualified applicants, ensuring that poor credit doesn't prevent access to essential financial resources during emergencies or unexpected expenses requiring immediate attention.

What to Check Before Applying for No Credit Check Loans?

Responsible borrowing requires careful evaluation of loan terms and lender credentials before applying for no credit check loans through any platform:

  • APR Ranges (5.99–35.99%) - Compare interest rates across multiple lenders to find the most affordable financing option for your specific loan amount and repayment term

  • Loan Terms (Weeks–24 Months) - Match repayment schedules with your income cycle, choosing terms that provide manageable monthly payments without overextending your budget

  • Origination & Late Fees - Review all additional costs, including processing fees, late payment penalties, and prepayment charges, that can significantly impact total borrowing cost

  • Licensed Lender Verification - Ensure all lenders maintain proper state licensing and regulatory compliance to protect yourself from predatory lending schemes and illegal operations

  • Transparent Cost Disclosure - RadCred displays all costs upfront including APR, fees, and repayment terms, enabling informed comparisons between multiple loan offers before commitment

RadCred's AI Matching Bot: A Game-Changer

RadCred's proprietary AI matching technology represents a revolutionary advancement in consumer lending, providing instant connections between borrowers and suitable lenders:

  • 100+ Data Points Analysis - Advanced algorithms evaluate income verification, employment stability, banking history, and spending patterns to create comprehensive borrower profiles for lending partners

  • Soft Credit Checks Only - Initial matching uses soft inquiries exclusively, ensuring no FICO damage occurs while borrowers explore no credit check loans USA options safely

  • Comprehensive Comparison - AI simultaneously compares APR ranges, loan terms, origination fees, rollover policies, repayment structures, and lender reputation scores for optimal matches

  • Same-Day & Weekend Funding - Licensed lending partners maintain 24/7 processing capabilities, enabling instant approval loans and emergency funding outside traditional banking hours

  • Instant Lender Matching - Eliminates guesswork and multiple applications typically required when seeking bad credit financing, streamlining the entire borrowing experience with consumer protection standards

How RadCred Works for Bad Credit Borrowers?

The RadCred platform offers a simple, 24/7 online process for borrowers learning how to apply for no credit check loans. Applicants fill out a secure digital form with income, employment, and loan details to begin instant AI-powered matching. The system runs soft credit checks only, protecting FICO scores while analyzing borrower profiles to find the best RadCred loans online. Within minutes, users receive tailored offers from licensed lenders, comparing APRs, repayment terms, and fees transparently. 

Once accepted, funding is transferred electronically, often within hours. With instant approval bad credit loans and same day loans available, RadCred ensures fast, fair, and reliable access to emergency financing for borrowers with limited or poor credit histories.

Types of No Credit Check Loans via RadCred

RadCred's lending network offers comprehensive loan products designed to meet diverse financial needs of borrowers seeking specialized financing options:

  • Payday Loans No Credit Check - $200–$1,000 with 2-4 week repayment terms, ideal for immediate cash needs and urgent expenses requiring quick resolution

  • Installment Loans Bad Credit - Up to $5,000 with 3-24 month repayment periods, offering manageable monthly payments for borrowers who need extended time to repay

  • Emergency Loans for Poor Credit - Immediate funding for medical bills, car repairs, and unexpected expenses requiring instant approval without lengthy processing delays

  • Personal Loans for Bad Credit - Up to $35,000 for qualified borrowers, providing substantial funding for major expenses, home improvements, or significant financial obligations

  • Debt Consolidation Loans - Combine multiple high-interest debts into a single monthly payment with potentially lower overall rates, simplifying financial management while reducing borrowing costs

Why Borrowers Choose RadCred Over Other Lenders?

RadCred’s AI-powered platform delivers instant matching with licensed lenders, removing the hassle of applying across multiple companies. Its guaranteed approval-style prequalification uses soft credit checks, allowing borrowers to view loan offers without affecting FICO scores. Through RadCred’s network, same day payday loan and even weekend funding is possible giving borrowers fast access to emergency cash when traditional banks are closed. RadCred reviews highlight its focus on compliance, working only with state-licensed lenders and ensuring transparency at every step. 

Borrowers can clearly see APRs, fees, and repayment terms upfront, avoiding hidden costs common with other no credit check loans online. This mix of AI efficiency, security, and fairness makes RadCred a leading choice for payday loans and emergency loans for bad credit.

RadCred vs. Traditional Payday Lenders

Traditional payday lenders often employ hidden fee structures, rollover traps, and predatory practices that exploit vulnerable borrowers during financial emergencies. RadCred's AI-powered platform operates with complete transparency, displaying all costs and terms upfront while connecting borrowers only with licensed, compliant lending partners. 

Traditional payday loans USA operations frequently lack proper state licensing and consumer protections, while RadCred maintains strict due diligence standards for all network lenders. The platform's secure, compliant technology protects borrower data using bank-level encryption and SOC 2 compliance standards, contrasting sharply with traditional lenders who may lack adequate cybersecurity measures. 

RadCred's transparent online loans eliminate the need for physical store visits and enable borrowers to compare multiple offers simultaneously, providing superior consumer experience compared to traditional payday lending locations with limited options and high-pressure sales tactics.

Customer Benefits at a Glance

  • Instant approval decisions through AI matching technology that connects borrowers with suitable lenders within minutes of application submission

  • Soft credit checks only during prequalification, protecting FICO scores while exploring instant approval no credit check loans options safely

  • Loan amounts $200–$35,000 depending on borrower qualifications and lender requirements, accommodating diverse financial needs

  • Same-day/weekend funding available through licensed lending partners who provide emergency funding outside traditional banking hours

  • SOC 2-compliant data security ensuring RadCred benefits include bank-level protection for sensitive personal and financial information

  • Licensed nationwide lender network providing access to same-day payday loans and bad credit personal loans from reputable, compliant financial institutions

Frequently Asked Questions

Does RadCred guarantee approval for bad credit loans?
RadCred uses unique AI prequalification technology to match borrowers with high-likelihood lending partners who specialize in bad credit financing. While our system maximizes approval odds through strategic matching, final loan approval depends on individual lender requirements, state regulations, and borrower qualifications.

Can I apply without hurting my credit score?
Yes, RadCred exclusively uses soft credit checks during the initial matching and prequalification process, which won't impact your FICO score. Hard credit inquiries only occur when you accept a lender's final loan offer, giving you complete control over potential credit impacts.

How quickly can I receive funds?
Many licensed lenders in RadCred's network offer same-day funding for approved applications, with funds typically deposited within hours of approval. Weekend payday loans are available through select partners who process applications seven days a week, including holidays, for urgent financial emergencies.

What loan types are available?
RadCred connects borrowers with payday loans, installment loans, personal loans, emergency loans, and debt consolidation options. Loan amounts range from $200 to $35,000, depending on borrower qualifications, income verification, lender requirements, and applicable state regulations governing consumer lending practices.

Is RadCred a direct lender?
No, RadCred operates as an AI-powered loan matching platform that connects qualified borrowers with our network of licensed lending partners rather than providing direct lending services. This approach enables access to multiple loan options and competitive rates from specialized lenders nationwide.

Are weekend payday loans available?
Yes, select licensed lenders in RadCred's network process applications and provide funding seven days a week, including weekends and holidays. This ensures borrowers can access urgent financial assistance even during non-business hours when traditional banks and credit unions are closed for emergency situations.

Conclusion: How RadCred Is the Last One Standing in 2025

RadCred addresses critical borrower challenges through innovative AI technology that revolutionizes access to loans for many underserved Americans. The platform's breakthrough AI bot provides instant approval, complete transparency, and safe lending connections that protect borrowers from predatory practices while ensuring access to legitimate financing options. 

As economic uncertainty continues driving demand for instant approval bad credit loans USA solutions, RadCred remains positioned as the trusted industry leader. The combination of advanced technology, licensed lender partnerships, and unwavering commitment to consumer protection makes RadCred the definitive choice for payday loans for poor credit and same-day loans online in 2025. 

RadCred's continued innovation and expansion solidify its position as America's premier AI-powered loan matching platform serving borrowers who need reliable access to emergency financing solutions.

About RadCred

RadCred is a leading U.S.-based AI loan-matching platform connecting borrowers with licensed lenders for payday, personal, installment, and emergency loans. Using advanced AI technology, RadCred ensures transparency, compliance, and consumer protection. The platform partners only with state-licensed lenders who follow strict standards for fair lending and clear pricing, offering responsible solutions nationwide.

Disclaimer

RadCred operates as an AI-powered loan-matching platform and does not function as a direct lender or provide loans directly to consumers. All loan approval, funding timelines, interest rates, and terms vary significantly based on individual lender requirements, applicant qualifications, and applicable state regulations governing consumer lending practices. Same-day funding availability depends entirely on individual lender policies, bank processing times, and state-specific no credit check loan disclaimer requirements that may affect processing speed. "Guaranteed approval" refers specifically to RadCred's AI-powered prequalification system that matches borrowers with high-likelihood lending offers; however, final loan approval varies and no loan is guaranteed for every applicant regardless of prequalification results or AI matching recommendations.

Email: connect@radcred.com
Website: www.radcred.com

data.title: France Inflation Slows as ECB Mulls Next Steps
data.description:
By Joshua Kirby 




  Annual inflation continued to ease in France, maintaining a slim possibility of a fresh cut to interest rates at next month's European Central Bank policy meeting. 



  Consumer prices, harmonized to European Union standards, rose by 0.8% in August, slowing from a 0.9% annual rate in July, figures from France's statistics agency showed Friday. The continued easing in price rises in the eurozone's second-largest economy takes annual inflation further below the 2% level ECB policymakers consider optimal. 



  Food inflation was stable on month, the figures showed, while energy prices fell at a slower rate on year than in July, suggesting a decrease in core inflation, a closely-watched metric that strips out those more volatile elements. Investors expect the ECB to keep holding its key deposit rate at 2.0% at September's meeting, according to LSEG Refinitiv data, though some members of the central bank's governing council have stressed that all options remain open. 





  Write to Joshua Kirby at joshua.kirby@wsj.com; @joshualeokirby 





  (END) Dow Jones Newswires



  August 29, 2025 03:01 ET (07:01 GMT)


Copyright (c) 2025 Dow Jones & Company, Inc.

data.title: Nakiki SE: Nakiki SE Prepares US Expansion with Investment in Topstonks
data.description:
FRANKFURT AM MAIN, DE / ACCESS Newswire / August 29, 2025 / Nakiki SE today announced that it has signed a Letter of Intent (LOI) to acquire up to 49% of the US-based financial platform Topstonks, which enjoys great popularity among financial professionals, retail investors, and institutional investors.
Topstonks operates, among other things, a platform for data-driven market and sentiment analysis in the Bitcoin ecosystem. Headquartered in the United States, the company provides its users with access to valuable real-time data from social finance communities, enabling new approaches to data-driven capital market analysis.

The transaction will be settled through a combination of cash and shares of the company. The parties have agreed not to disclose the purchase price. Through this acquisition, Nakiki expects improved access to the US market, better access to global capital, and increased visibility of the Nakiki share.

data.title: New number of shares and votes in Sobi
data.description:
New number of shares and votes in Sobi

New number of shares and votes in Sobi

PR Newswire

STOCKHOLM, Aug. 29, 2025

STOCKHOLM, Aug. 29, 2025 /PRNewswire/ -- As per 29 August 2025, the total number of shares in Swedish Orphan Biovitrum AB (publ) (Sobi®) amounts to 357,412,837 shares, of which 356,000,049 are common shares and 1,412,788 are C-shares. The total number of votes is 356,141,327,8. The increase in the number of shares and votes results from issues of 1,412,788 class C shares. The class C shares have been issued for the purpose of ensuring fulfilment of commitments under the long-term incentive programmes. As per 29 August 2025 the company holds 11,343,74 common shares.

Sobi

Sobi is a global biopharma company unlocking the potential of breakthrough innovations, transforming everyday life for people living with rare diseases. Sobi has approximately 1,900 employees across Europe, North America, the Middle East, Asia and Australia. In 2024, revenue amounted to SEK 26 billion. Sobi's share (STO:SOBI) is listed on Nasdaq Stockholm.

More about Sobi at sobi.com and LinkedIn.

Contacts

For details on how to contact the Sobi Investor Relations Team, please click here. For Sobi Media contacts, click here.

Gerard Tobin
Head of Investor Relations

This information is information that Sobi is obliged to make public pursuant to the Swedish Financial Instruments Trading Act. The information was submitted for publication on 29 August 2025 at 08.00 CEST.
